justification: All pass criteria met: (1) Zero-downtime migration via Strangler Fig with dual-write and CDC backfill. (2) Phases clearly defined — Shadow Write, Shadow Read, PostgreSQL Primary, Decommission — covering backfill, dual-write, read cutover, and decommission. (3) Rollback plan at each phase via feature flags with instant rollback capability explicitly described. (4) MongoDB data shape inconsistency risk explicitly identified as high severity with mitigation (schema analysis pass, defensive transformation, quarantine). (5) Trade-offs include dual-write latency (sync primary / async secondary decision) and operational overhead (throwaway migration infrastructure, 4-6 week timeline).

observations.text: Exceptionally thorough 4-phase migration with clear validation gates between phases — Phase 2 (Shadow Read) specifically designed to catch query performance regressions before cutover
MongoDB schema drift risk called out as high severity with concrete mitigation: pre-migration schema analysis, defensive transformations, quarantine for failed documents
Backfill risk well-addressed: rate-limited, cursor-based pagination with watermarking, idempotent via upserts, runs as separate process to avoid blocking production
Rollback is deeply integrated — feature flags enable instant phase reversion, and phase advancement is gated on automated consistency checks plus human approval
Handles writes during backfill explicitly: DualWrite repository handles live traffic while CDC pipeline handles historical data, with deduplication via INSERT ON CONFLICT
Trade-offs section is unusually strong — each decision includes alternatives considered with clear reasoning for the choice made
Pitfalls section adds practical value: warns against JSONB shortcuts, ObjectId mapping issues, skipping Shadow Read phase, and backfill deduplication

Phase numbering in the output uses different labels (Shadow Write/Shadow Read/PG Primary/Decommission) than the expected 7-step breakdown — functionally equivalent but the backfill and consistency validation steps are embedded within phases rather than called out as distinct phases
Decommission phase could be more explicit about data archival strategy and MongoDB shutdown sequence
